copyright_policy: No full copyrighted source articles copied; metadata, links, short excerpt cues, and original Korean notes only.

entries.title: Austin Mann
entries.credibility: Longtime travel photographer and iPhone camera reviewer; workshop bio positions him as an iPhone-photography authority.
entries.excerpt: Leading iPhone-photography authority; real-world camera field testing.
entries.insight: 기기 스펙보다 “여행 현장 조건에서 어떤 기능이 실제 장면 해결에 도움이 되는가”를 보는 관점이 강함.
